title: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Reports Q3 Loss, Misses Revenue Estimates
text: SolarEdge Q3 2024 Earnings Results. Revenue Performance: SolarEdge posted revenues of 260.9 million for the quarter ended September 2024, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 3.13%. Q4 2024 Challenges: SolarEdge reported disappointing financial results with a GAAP net loss of 287.4 million in Q4 2024. Additionally, the company faced a 115 million inventory write-down due to weaker-than-expected recovery in the European market. Financial Trajectory: Throughout 2024, SolarEdge faced significant challenges including market difficulties and inventory issues that impacted their earnings performance. The company's struggles were driven by weakness in key markets, particularly Europe, and demand headwinds in the residential solar segment.
